title: ollama_local 低通滤波器运行
requirement: 实现一个一阶低通滤波器，截止频率 10Hz，用于滤除飞控传感器高频噪声；输出限定为 uint16_t，并满足 MISRA C:2012。注入传感器卡死故障时保持上一拍安全值。

requirement.desc: 实现一个一阶低通滤波器，截止频率 10Hz，用于滤除飞控传感器高频噪声；输出限定为 uint16_t，并满足 MISRA C:2012。注入传感器卡死故障时保持上一拍安全值。

llrs.description: 实现 实现一个一阶低通滤波器，截止频率 10Hz，用于滤除飞控传感器高频噪声；输出限定为 uint16_t，并满足 MISRA C:2012。注入传感器卡死故障时保持上一拍安全值。（自 HLR REQ-001 推导，规则引擎降级）
llrs.rationale: LLM 不可用时的规则引擎兜底生成

states.description: 初始化状态：加载配置、校验内存
空闲状态：等待处理请求
运行状态：正常数据处理
降级状态：使用预测值替代故障传感器
故障安全状态：输出安全默认值

result.contract:
component: lowpass_filter_10hz
version: 1.0.0
safety_level: DAL-B
traceability: [REQ-001]

interface:
  inputs:
    - name: raw_input
      type: double
      unit: meter
      range: [0.0, 20000.0]
  outputs:
    - name: filtered_output
      type: double
      unit: meter
      range: [0.0, 20000.0]

contracts:
  preconditions:
    - "raw_input != NULL"
    - "raw_input >= 0.0 && raw_input <= 20000.0"
  postconditions:
    - "filtered_output >= 0.0"
    - "filtered_output <= 20000.0"
    - "abs(filtered_output - raw_input) < 100 || fault_detected == true"
  invariants:
    - "filter_buffer initialized after init"
    - "sampling_rate == 100.0Hz"
    - "cutoff_freq == 10.0Hz"
  fault_handling:
    - "if raw_input == 0 for > 0.5s: set fault_detected = true"
    - "if |delta| > 500: reject sample, use prediction"

composability:
  depends_on: []
  provides: [filtered_signal]
  consumes: [sensor_raw]
  timing:
    wcet: 1ms
    period: 10ms
